text:
Fred loved chasing squirrels. Every morning, he would hop outside his bedroom window with an appetite for little rodents. He had a small boomerang he liked to throw at them.

One autumn morning, Fred caught five squirrels. The squirrels were very startled, flew right into a pile of fallen leaves. Fred couldn't help but laugh as he began dancing around. The startled squirrels didn't appreciate his jubilation.

"Whoa!" one squeaked.

"Dance with me!" Fred called out.

The squirrels weren't sure what Fred was talking about. They scurried away, hopping over stones. Fred followed their scurrying.

Halfway across the park he discovered a new leaf pile that would serve as a perfect dance floor. He jumped into the air, doing a little pirouette, then landed with a plop.

"Whee!" he cheered.

For hours he danced joyfully, singing old folk songs – or maybe something off-key about acorns. The
